EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT

This Employment Agreement is entered into between Employer Corp and Employee.

COMPENSATION: Employee shall receive a base salary of $X per year, payable bi-weekly. Performance bonuses may be awarded at the discretion of management.

TERMINATION: Employment is at-will. Either party may terminate this agreement at any time with or without cause, with two weeks written notice.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: All work product, inventions, and developments created by Employee during the course of employment shall be assigned to and become the property of Employer Corp.

NON-COMPETE: Employee agrees not to engage in competing business activities for a period of 12 months following termination of employment.

DISPUTE RESOLUTION: Any dispute arising out of this agreement shall first be submitted to mediation before any legal action is taken.

GOVERNING LAW: This agreement shall be governed by the applicable law of California.
